prompt: Generate a collage featuring the garden gate from image 1 as the entry point, surrounded by floral elements from image 2 and leaf clusters from image 3, with a translucent overlay of the child’s silhouette from image 4 emerging through the scene.
prompt_refined: Generate a layered garden artwork. Center the rustic, arched gate from image 1 as the focal point. Surround it abundantly with the diverse floral elements from image 2 and the translucent, layered leaf clusters from image 3, creating a lush, organic border. Overlay the entire scene with the translucent silhouette of the child from image 4, positioned to appear subtly emerging from within the composition, blowing dandelion seeds.
objects: rustic, arched gate (centered as focal point)
lush, organic border surrounding the gate
translucent silhouette of a child (from image 4)
child subtly emerging from within the composition
dandelion seeds being blown by the child
